query_normalized: predicting molecular reactivity using graph neural networks and public databases chemistry
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational methodology reference for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and category (f) as it addresses the canonical "homophily/heterophily" construct central to GNN performance on molecular graphs.
